chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 792 of 2024 (Munsif Khan v. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 29.05.2024 Mr. Raja Rashid Ali, advocate for the applicant Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Assistant Prosecutor General for the State ----------------------------------- It is alleged that the applicant with the rest of the culprits robbed complainant Muhammad Faiz of his motorcycle, for which the present case was registered. The applicant having been refused bail by learned XIth-Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi, West, has sought the same from this Court by way of instant bail application under Section 497 Cr.P.C. Heard arguments and perused the record. The FIR of the incident has been lodged with a delay of about ten days; it does not contain the name of the applicant. It was disclosed by co- accused Muhammad Ali and Muhammad Hamza after their arrest in the police encounter case; such disclosure could hardly be used against the applicant as evidence. The applicant has not been subjected to an identification parade through the Magistrate. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. Under the given circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly.

Under the given circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
